The '''4XB Programmer Droid''' model was designed by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] to oversee and program other [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. 4XB units used complicated electronic sound patterns to program other droids, which must be fitted with a [[CG1XB Translator Module]]. It was not uncommon that a 4XB unit would handle the day-to-day operation of automated mines, factories, prisons, and law enforcing agencies. It was a 4XB unit that administrated the prison colony of [[Balis-Baurgh]].<ref name="EBB" />
